title: ferray-core: no memory-mapped array support
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.memmap creates an array backed by a memory-mapped file, enabling out-of-core computation on arrays larger than RAM. ferray has no equivalent. The memmap2 crate provides the Rust mmap primitive; wrapping it in an ArrayView with appropriate lifetime management would provide basic memmap support. This is low priority but important for large-dataset workflows.
